title: onobrychis marandensis
intro: Onobrychis marandensis, also known as Marandi sainfoin, is a perennial legume native to Iran and other parts of the Middle East. It is a type of herbaceous plant known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Onobrychis marandensis include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. The plant's medicinal properties are often extracted through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and dried extracts, which can be consumed as teas, capsules, or added to food products.
